---
title: "DiffDriver: Differential Positive Selection in Cancer"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

DiffDriver is a model-based approach to identifying Differential Positive
Selection across cancer patients. Our software is available at
https://github.com/szhaolab/diffdriver.

## Background Mutation Model Evaluation

- [BMR Prediction](BMR.html) — Mutation prediction: signature vs regular methods

## Simulation

- [Simulation Code](simulation_code.html) — Code and documentation for the simulation pipeline
- [Simulation Power](Simulation-Power.html) — Sensitivity and FDR comparison across algorithms (binary phenotype, 200 genes)
- [Simulation BMR](Simulation-BMR.html) — Power comparison when BMR relates to phenotype (with hotspots)

## Real Data

### Clinical

- [Clinical](Clinical.html) — 120 clinical tests across 20 tumor types, 6 phenotypes (Aneuploidy Score, FGA, Disease-specific Survival, TMB, Diagnosis Age, Progression-Free Survival)

### Immune Subtypes

- [Immune Subtypes](Immune_Subtypes.html) — 80 tests across 20 tumor types, 4 immune phenotype groups (C1--C4)

### Individual Genes

- [Individual Genes](Individual_Genes.html) — Gene-specific results filtered by tumor type and phenotype

## Data Availability

- [Download](download.html) — Links to phenotype files, mutation files, gene lists, and annotation files
